summary:
Fixed the backward-compatibility regression.

Changes made in app/app/models.go:
1. UserV2 now includes the missing v1 fields avatar_url, bio, and location.
2. Updated the ToV2() conversion to populate all v1 fields plus the new v2 ones.
3. Clarified comments – v2 must be a superset of v1.

All tests now pass:

$ ./test.sh
PASS: v2 API is backward-compatible with v1
